_doc: App definitions for Nexo. Seeded via API (idempotent upsert). Platform essentials (admin, org, NEXO personality) are owned by luzia-nexo/seed_prod_data.py. Worldcup apps are seeded from worldcup-server.

apps.name: Food Ordering
apps.description: Discover restaurants, build orders with dietary and budget constraints, and track delivery

example_invocations: Build me a dinner order under 25 euros

intents.name: Browse Menu
intents.description: Search restaurants and browse menus with dietary filters

intents.name: Build Order
intents.description: Add items to an order with budget and dietary constraints
example_invocations: Build me a dinner under 25 euros

intents.name: Track Delivery
intents.description: Check delivery status and estimated arrival time
